description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a steep gable roof covered in dark shingles and solar panels. The exterior walls are clad in a mix of horizontal and vertical siding, primarily in shades of gray, with large windows providing ample natural light. A prominent glass atrium or stairwell is visible at the center, flanked by a set of stairs leading to the main entrance. The structure includes a side extension with a flat roof, likely serving as a sunroom or covered patio, and a small porch area at the front. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped and others standing alone, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The house sits on a flat, grassy plot, with steps and a walkway leading up to the entrance.
description: A modern bungalow with a steep gable roof, large windows, and a mix of horizontal and vertical gray siding, featuring a central glass atrium and a side extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central glass atrium, and steps leading up to the door, with the side extension visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the front porch area with steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the continuation of the glass atrium, and the side extension with a flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end with large windows and the side profile of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
